item.title: This is Hadley Palmer (53), a millionaire who was caught secretly filming minors, "for her sexual pleasure", in her $10 million mansion. The current status of her punishment reeks of privilege. Do not let this go unnoticed. Demand equal punishment.

item.title: Red in the St Petersburg Canal
item.description: Someone has poured red dye into the icy water under a bridge over Griboyedov Canal in St. Petersburg. This is in full view of the Church of the Savior on Spilled Blood, a cathedral that marks the spot of the assassination of Tsar Alexander II. Pretty striking visual, and possibly a (symbolic, at least) threat against Putin. That's what Russians do to their tsars. The last few, anyway.
item.dc:creator: AsAHistorian

item.title: For Ukraine to have a Jewish President descended from a Holocaust survivor standing up to a dictator is really empowering
item.description: In 1941 over 33,000 Ukrainian Jews were murdered in a 2 day span in the Babi Yar ravine marking one of the deadliest massacrers of the Holocaust. For Ukraine to have a Jewish President descended from a Holocaust survivor standing up to a dictator is really empowering.
item.dc:creator: Addicted2Groove

item.title: Improvised body armor for Ukrainians
item.description: Today I’m going to be providing an instructional video for the construction of improvised bullet resistant plates as well as some of my own findings from testing plates constructed using this method, something I think our friends in Ukraine could use going forward. Required materials: 1. Epoxy resin 2. Fiberglass welding blankets 3. Several C-clamps (preferably metal) 4. A respirator of sufficient quality for working with fiberglass 5. A jig saw 6. Two dummy plates, made of wood or preferably metal, shaped as you want the finished product to be shaped 7. Packing tape (It helps to keep your final plate from getting stuck to the dummy plates) Link to video: https://youtu.be/_7jiIQOgwtI My personal findings: Through some of my own testing after making these plates I can corroborate the following results of the video The plates produced through this method of construction without fail stopped bullets of the following calibers at close range (10 yards): 9x19mm 125 grain FMJ fired from a glock 17 .45 acp 230 grain FMJ fired from a glock 21 .40 S&W 180 grain FMJ fired from a glock 23 .380 auto 92 grain FMJ fired from a S&W bodyguard 12 gauge 000 buckshot fired from a Remington 870 12 gauge rifled slugs fired from a Remington 870 I can also corroborate that this armor will not stop 5.56 or 7.62 at close range, however at 300 yards or more, it will consistently stop the following cartridges 5.56x45mm NATO 62 grain FMJ-BT fired from a civilian AR-15 with 16 inch barrel (a decent approximation of the Russian 5.45x39mm cartridge) 7.62x39mm 122 grain FMJ fired from a civilian AK-47 with 16.5 inch barrel Wear your goddam respirator while making these things Slava Ukraini
item.dc:creator: T3NM1DG3TS

item.title: The russian army has deployed the TOS-1 heavy flamethrower which shoots thermobaric rockets, this was South of Belgorod.
item.description: This weapon has the capacity to fry and destroy whole city blocks. Range up to 3500m. It's on the road to Kharkiv. Pray it never gets there. God save Ukraine. God damn Putin.

item.dc:creator: oldbaldjewishman

item.title: German howitzers on their way to Ukraine
item.description: Help is on the way #staywithukraine #ukraine #ukraine_conflict #fuckputin Correction: they are heading only to east nato counties not Ukraine (so far) And if you want to do something: help putting down Russian propaganda join https://t.me/itarmyofukraine2022 (no IT knowledge needed) Yes you need to download telegram (it’s like discord/WhatsApp) yes it’s valid (posted by vice prime minister president of Ukraine) (twitter: @FedorovMykhailo) No it doesn’t break down your internet (I’m in 10h+) Yes the original group is with typo (urraine) but leads to this channel too (link in group) And one thing more! Not Russia or Russians are the enemies! It’s only War-criminal Putin!! Edit: Germany sends additionally to the already said weapons fuel and 14 armored vehicles for personal protection ( https://www.focus.de/politik/ausland/ukraine-krise/was-koennen-sie-wie-kommen-sie-hin-diese-waffen-liefert-deutschland-jetzt-an-die-ukraine_id_60117900.html )

item.title: Seems like a good time to repost this Molotov safety psa for our friends in the Ukraine. Give em hell! ??
item.dc:creator: Iceman0624

item.title: Imminent Air raid expected in Kyivv. Spreading for awareness
item.description: 1: It is dangerous to watch what is going on in an air raid. The only safe thing to do is take cover. Anti-aircraft shells are designed to explode in the air, and the fragments of metal, including the heavy nose-cap, will descend on the country below. Machine-gun bullets fired from aeroplanes will also fall to the ground. Even if the raid is a considerable distance away, shell fragments may fall many miles from the scene of action. 2: Shelter in the Home Air raid tips: https://www.who.int/hac/techguidance/tools/protection_from_aerial_attacks.pdf
item.dc:creator: AstralDebris
